query:
-- 查询批次ID
SELECT id, variantCode, variantName, erpCompanyId 
FROM product_variants 
WHERE variantCode = 'DC-001-GRY-V017';

-- 查询该批次的材料（假设ID是60033，根据上面的结果调整）
SELECT vm.*, mc.colorCode, mc.colorName 
FROM variant_materials vm
LEFT JOIN material_colors mc ON vm.materialColorId = mc.id
WHERE vm.variantId = (SELECT id FROM product_variants WHERE variantCode = 'DC-001-GRY-V017' LIMIT 1);

-- 查询该批次的材料（假设ID是60033，根据上面的结果调整）
SELECT vm.*, mc.colorCode, mc.colorName 
FROM variant_materials vm
